Skip to navigation
MDXG Redline
No file

Pages

awsd / e
awsd
No file loaded
Open a markdown file to start reviewing
awsd / e
Select text in the file to add a review comment.
＋ Comment
Selected text
Add a review comment
Esc to cancel

Keyboard shortcuts

a / d
Move focus to the pane on the left / right (TOC ↔ doc ↔ comments)
w / s
Move focus up / down within the current pane (line scroll in doc)
e
Activate the focused item (same as Enter / click)
f
Open search
h
Show this help
↑ / ↓
Move within TOC / comments (same as w / s)
Home / End
Jump to first / last TOC entry
Tab
Move forward through TOC links and other controls
Enter
Activate the focused entry (or Enter / Shift+Enter for next/prev search match)
Esc
Close any open modal, menu, or search
Esc to close

Diagram

Scroll to zoom · drag to pan
Esc to close
